title: claytonia perfoliata var. rubra
intro: Claytonia perfoliata var. rubra, also known as Red Miner's Lettuce or Red Spring Beauty, is a variety of the Miner's Lettuce plant, a flowering perennial native to the western regions of North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Claytonia perfoliata var. rubra include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Claytonia perfoliata var. rubra can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
